Package com.here.platform.data.client.utils.rsql

Interface ParsedQuery

All Known Subinterfaces:
PartitionCondition, VersionCondition
All Known Implementing Classes:
OneVersion, PartitionFromFeatureIds, PartitionFromIds, PartitionInArea, PartitionWithProperties, PartitionWithPropertiesAndSelection, PartitionWithSelection, PartitionWithTimestamp, PartitionWithVersion, PropertyCondition, RangeVersion, SelectionCondition, TimestampCondition
